ham.subject: Flipkart Order Confirmation – #123456789
ham.body:
Hello Ravi,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart! Your order #123456789 has been successfully placed and is now being processed.

Order details:
• Item 1: Xiaomi Redmi 10 – Qty: 1 – ₹ 4999
• Item 2: Amazon Basics USB-C Cable – Qty: 2 – ₹ 299
Total: ₹ 5597 + GST 18% = ₹ 6540.36

Shipping:
• Address: 123, MG Road, Bengaluru
• Expected delivery: 3-5 business days
• Tracking number: <URL> (use this link to track)

If you have any queries or need to change delivery details, reply to this email or call our customer support at 1800-123-456.

Thanks for choosing Flipkart!

Best Regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

spam.subject: Zoom Meeting Invite – Urgent: Discuss Project X
spam.body:
Dear Team,

You have been invited to a Zoom/Teams meeting titled 'Project X Review' scheduled on 12th April 2026 at 15:00 IST. This meeting is critical for the next sprint and attendance is mandatory for all stakeholders.

Meeting details:
• Platform: Zoom (or Teams)
• Link: <URL>
• Meeting ID: 123 4567 8901
• Password: 123456

Kripya 5 minute early join karein to ensure smooth start. Agar aap attend nahi kar sakte, please inform the manager immediately.

Best,
IT Operations
